description: Standard phrase options for Streamlit picker and Excel PhraseCatalog sheet (phrase_key, option_id, text).

options.label: Option 1 (AER, 2014)
options.text: Drilling waste was managed in accordance with AER requirements. Option 1 (AER, 2014) applies to this well.

options.label: Option 2 — alternative disposal
options.text: Drilling waste was managed under an approved alternative disposal pathway. Details are summarized in the drilling waste table.

options.label: Site visit not completed
options.text: A site visit was not completed as part of this Phase I ESA. Findings are based on available records, regulatory databases, and historical air photo review.

options.label: Site visit completed
options.text: A site visit was completed as part of this Phase I ESA. Observations from the visit are summarized below and in the site visit checklist.

options.label: Phase II recommended
options.text: Based on the findings of this Phase I ESA, a Phase II Environmental Site Assessment is recommended to further evaluate identified areas of potential environmental concern.

options.label: Phase II not required at this time
options.text: Based on the findings of this Phase I ESA, a Phase II Environmental Site Assessment is not recommended at this time, subject to client direction and future land use.

options.label: Annual compliance monitoring
options.text: This report presents results of the annual groundwater monitoring program conducted to assess groundwater quality and water levels relative to applicable Alberta guidelines and site-specific objectives.

options.label: Baseline characterization
options.text: This report summarizes baseline groundwater quality and static water levels following installation of the monitoring well network.

options.label: Low-flow sampling
options.text: Groundwater samples were collected using low-flow purging and sampling methods in accordance with project-specific sampling procedures and laboratory requirements.

options.label: Bailer / standard purge
options.text: Groundwater samples were collected after purging each monitoring well until field parameters stabilized, using dedicated sampling equipment.

options.label: Data suitable for interpretation
options.text: Field notes and laboratory quality control indicate that the groundwater data are suitable for comparison to applicable guidelines, subject to the limitations noted herein.

options.label: Qualified usability
options.text: Some data limitations are noted in the field log and tables below; interpreted trends should be considered qualified where purge volumes or hold times were atypical.

options.label: Continue monitoring
options.text: Ecoventure recommends continued groundwater monitoring at the established frequency to evaluate temporal trends and confirm stability of exceedances.

options.label: Investigation recommended
options.text: Ecoventure recommends additional investigation of exceedances identified in this reporting period, including potential source areas and downgradient wells.

options.label: Remediation ongoing
options.text: Remediation activities are ongoing at the site under an approved remedial action plan. This report summarizes confirmatory sampling and progress toward remedial objectives.

options.label: Confirmatory sampling
options.text: This report documents confirmatory groundwater and soil sampling conducted to verify achievement of remedial objectives.

options.label: Objectives met
options.text: Confirmatory sampling results indicate that remedial objectives were met for the parameters and media evaluated.

options.label: Further work required
options.text: Confirmatory sampling results indicate that additional remedial action or monitoring is required for one or more parameters.

options.label: Support closure
options.text: Based on the data presented, Ecoventure supports proceeding with regulatory closure documentation, subject to agency review.

options.label: Defer closure
options.text: Ecoventure recommends deferring closure until additional monitoring or remedial work is completed.
